name: codex-apple-plugin
description: Local Codex plugins for Apple Mail, Calendar, and Reminders workflows.

scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:mcp && npm run build:mail-helper && npm run build:calendar-helper && npm run build:reminders-helper
scripts.build:mcp: mkdir -p plugins/apple-mail/dist plugins/apple-calendar/dist plugins/apple-reminders/dist && esbuild src/servers/mail.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --outfile=plugins/apple-mail/dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/servers/calendar.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --outfile=plugins/apple-calendar/dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/servers/reminders.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --outfile=plugins/apple-reminders/dist/index.mjs
scripts.build:mail-helper: swift build --package-path swift && mkdir -p plugins/apple-mail/dist && cp swift/.build/debug/apple-mail-helper plugins/apple-mail/dist/apple-mail-helper
scripts.build:calendar-helper: mkdir -p plugins/apple-calendar/dist && xcrun swiftc -framework AppKit -framework EventKit -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker helpers/calendar-helper-info.plist helpers/calendar-tool.swift -o plugins/apple-calendar/dist/calendar-helper && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements helpers/eventkit-helper-entitlements.plist plugins/apple-calendar/dist/calendar-helper
scripts.build:reminders-helper: mkdir -p plugins/apple-reminders/dist && xcrun swiftc -framework EventKit -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker src/reminders/reminders-helper-info.plist src/reminders/remindersHelper.swift -o plugins/apple-reminders/dist/reminders-helper && codesign --force --sign - --entitlements helpers/eventkit-helper-entitlements.plist plugins/apple-reminders/dist/reminders-helper
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
